body.key_features: Open layout, huge primary bedroom, primary en-suite with dual vanity, large tiled shower, walk in closet. Stainless steel appliances, laundry on main floor, 3 bedrooms on main floor, fireplace, maintenance free deck with stairs, fenced in back yard, sprinkler system, huge basement family room that spans whole width of home, office/den in basement, unfinished bathroom in basement with finished bedroom and walk in closet. Large utility room for storage, zero entry home meaning no stairs to enter, corner pantry in kitchen, lots of cupboard space and large center kitchen island
body.neighborhood_notes: Walking distance to the Douglas state trail, pine island elementary school, short drive to highway 52
body.previous_listings:
Ideally situated on a spacious corner lot, this beautifully refreshed home has a lot to offer! Main floor living at its finest, with 3 bedrooms, full bath, and laundry all on one level. The interior has been thoughtfully revitalized, featuring new kitchen and bathroom flooring, new kitchen appliances, finished basement, new doors, and outdoor fence perfect for your pets. The finished basement adds a large family room, office/workout room, and walkout to your backyard space great for entertaining. Located just 15 minutes from Rochester, within walking distance of Pine Island Middle/High School and the Douglas State Trail, this home is a must see!

—-

Beautiful 2-story side-by-side townhome offering comfort, convenience, and low-maintenance living! This well-maintained townhome offers functional layout with 3 bedrooms on the upper level with full bath. Relax in your open living room that flows into the dining/kitchen area featuring stainless steel appliances, ample cabinets space, and great countertop space. Escape to the lower level and enjoy the family room, play room and office space. End unit home, offers extra yard space, with convenient patio space out back. Located in a quiet neighborhood, easy access to Highway 14, this one is move-in ready!
body.property_address: 2018 Douglas Trail Dr, Pine Island, MN 55963
